answers: Remittance is money sent by people working abroad back to their home country, usually to support family members. It's a vital source of income for many developing nations.
Remittance holo bidesh theke desh e taka pathano. Bangladesh er jonno remittance onek important - GDP er ekta boro part remittance theke ashe.
You can send remittance through banks, money transfer services like Western Union or Wise, mobile banking apps, or online transfer platforms at varying fees and exchange rates.
For the cheapest remittance, compare services like Wise, Remitly, and WorldRemit which often offer better exchange rates and lower fees than traditional banks.
